title: Confluence PBR Emission
description: An expansion pack added PBR extra-glowing effects to Confluence:Otherworld mod
body:
[Confluence PBR Remake材质](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/confluenceotherworld-pbr)和[汇流来世模组](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/18650.html)的PBR发光材质拓展包，为汇流来世的矿石和圣物等添加了额外的PBR发光，所有PBR内容需要在支持LabPBR标准的光影上工作，最推荐的光影是[Sundial-Lite](https://github.com/GeForceLegend/Sundial-Lite)

A PBR expansion pack for texture pack [Confluence PBR Remake](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/confluenceotherworld-pbr) which added extra glowing effect for Ores and Relics in mod [Confluence:Otherworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/confluence).To experience this resource pack,you need a shader support LabPBR standard,the most recommend shader is [Sundial-Lite](https://github.com/GeForceLegend/Sundial-Lite)


![working example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f5c5a948eb50ee533c24a3b2f0ce6a215fa426f.jpeg)
此发光拓展包需要与主包[Confluence PBR Remake](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/confluenceotherworld-pbr)搭配使用，加载时置于主包上方，示例如上图。

This expansion pack should cooperate with main-pack[Confluence PBR Remake](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/confluenceotherworld-pbr),put it above the main-pack,the example is shown in the image above.
